calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-25-2011 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Reset To Oct-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Brenda Fields, #7235.

Petitioner Yu Sheng Yu was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Leyi Yu, who was not present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Jenny Zhang was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner Yu Sheng Yu.
No appearance by petitioner Xia Li, but she (mother) signed the petition on July 18, 2011.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Emma Leyi Yu.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
